production_approval.reason: Fresh relaxed-gate COIN debit-spread selector from runs/portfolio-weekly-selector-research-20260701T123830.159238000Z is a full_promotion_candidate under the 26 trades/year ranking cadence and 7.5% canary capital-DD cap: 2277 trades, 121255 PnL, 64330 $25-cost PnL, 1.81 profit factor, 5.59% capital DD on the 100k research budget, 46.8% max symbol PnL share from TSLA, 19 symbol-ablation passes, and 1 strategy-ablation pass. COIN adds 9 direct trades, 1107 raw PnL, and the remove_symbol:COIN ablation reverts to the prior approved baseline of 2274 trades, 119081 PnL, and 62231 $25-cost PnL. QCOM was rejected because expanded coverage reduced after-cost portfolio PnL, while AMZN/RIVN remain watchlist-only until deeper coverage proves their allocation-interaction edge. Production remains limited to broker-reconciled Tradier put/call debit-spread entry and close lifecycle gates with account-sized budget controls.
